violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment will use disposables until unit is properly adjusted or the 3 bay sink to manually sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The kitchen hoods have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink at the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was parts 0 per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment must use 3 bay sink to wash, rinse and sanitize equipment and utensils. Sanitizer bottle observed at a low level; establishment to replace sanitizer bottle and prime machine. If machine does not read the proper concentration, establishment to call for service. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
Trays of food were observed held in the walk-in cooler past 7 days. Foods were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the chlorine sanitizing solution of the 3 bay sinks and glass washer. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

1. Laminate lined wall in the kitchen behind the 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair 2. Walls in the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. Sealant observed in poor repair causing black and white residue to accumulate The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025
